data.name: SeductVille
data.detailed_description:
A city. New encounters. And a game of seduction with no pressure.

You’ve just moved to SeductVille — a charming and enigmatic town where your new life is about to take a surprising turn.
The apartment you’ve inherited once belonged to your aunt, a woman with a bold and mysterious past. But the real intrigue lies in the women you'll meet.

Each one has her own personality, desires, and boundaries.
Some are here for fun, others want to be challenged… or heard.
It’s up to you to find out what they truly want — and how far they’re willing to go.

Key Features

  • First-person perspective for full immersion

  • Interactive dialogues with multiple choices, each with distinct outcomes

  • Dynamic relationship system that evolves with your interactions

  • Romantic and erotic scenes, depending on your style of play

  • In-game SeductDex to track characters, collectibles, and stats

  • Personal Journal uncovering memories, clues, and messages from your aunt

  • Hidden challenges across the city that unlock bonus scenes and items

  • Bold, unique female characters: playful, dominant, sensitive, provocative...

Each character has her own story...
And some of those stories might just be connected.

A freeform seduction game

Play the way you want.
There are no wrong answers, no game overs.
Some choices may unlock new opportunities, others may change your direction — but none will hold you back.
It’s your story. Your approach. Your pace.

Tags & Themes

Genres: Visual Novel · Romance · Dating Sim · Simulation · Point & Click
Themes: Seduction · Secrets · Erotic tension · Psychological play · Relationships
Content: Explicit adult scenes, shown only if you choose to see them.
Your choice is respected — opting out will never penalize your progression.

She left you more than just an apartment...

A place to stay.
A mysterious notebook.
A trail of secrets.
And a town full of desires.

Your aunt may have passed on more than just a key.

Move in.
Observe. Tease. Explore.
And most of all… enjoy the ride.

Adults only. For mature audiences.

data.short_description: Dive into SeductVille, a city full of mystery and temptation. Meet unique women, face secret challenges, and uncover what your aunt truly left behind. A free and evolving adult visual novel where your choices shape the story.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 / 8 / 10 / 11 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Dual Core 2.0 GHz or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible or higher
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Recommended resolution: 1920x1080

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04 or equivalent (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Dual Core 2.0 GHz or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: libc6, libstdc++, libgl1, SDL2 (usually preinstalled on SteamOS)
